mapper.select: SELECT l.LECTURE_SN, l.LECTURE_NM, l.LECTURE_DURATION, l.LECTURE_TYPE_CD, l.SORT_ORD, COUNT(CASE WHEN p.CMPL_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CMPL_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED') AS TOT_MEMBER_CNT FROM LECTURE l JOIN CLASSROOM c ON c.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN STUDENT_CONTENT_PROGRESS p ON p.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND p.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} WHERE c.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} GROUP BY l.LECTURE_SN, l.LECTURE_NM, l.LECTURE_DURATION, l.LECTURE_TYPE_CD, l.SORT_ORD ORDER BY l.SORT_ORD ASC, l.LECTURE_SN ASC

SELECT LECTURE_SN, COURSE_SN, LECTURE_NM, LECTURE_TYPE_CD, LECTURE_DURATION, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, OPNN_YN, LOCK_YN, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID FROM LECTURE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC, LECTURE_SN ASC

SELECT LECTURE_SN, COURSE_SN, LECTURE_NM, LECTURE_TYPE_CD, LECTURE_DURATION, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, OPNN_YN, LOCK_YN, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, ATCH_FILE_ID FROM LECTURE WHERE LECTURE_SN = #{lectureSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LECTURE ( COURSE_SN, LECTURE_NM, LECTURE_TYPE_CD, ATCH_FILE_ID, LECTURE_DURATION, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, OPNN_YN, LOCK_YN, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID ) VALUES ( #{courseSn}, #{lectureNm}, #{lectureTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{atchFileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lectureDuration, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lectureExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{lockYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'N'), #{prereqLectureSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LECTURE SET LECTURE_NM = #{lectureNm}, LECTURE_TYPE_CD = #{lectureTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LECTURE_DURATION = #{lectureDuration, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN = #{lectureExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPNN_YN = #{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, LOCK_YN = #{lockYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN = #{prereqLectureSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId} WHERE LECTURE_SN = #{lectureSn}
mapper.select:
SELECT l.LECTURE_SN, l.COURSE_SN, l.LECTURE_NM, l.ATCH_FILE_ID, l.LECTURE_DURATION, l.LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, (select seconds_watched from lecture_progress where user_id = #{userId} and lecture_sn = l.lecture_sn and course_sn = l.course_sn) as seconds_watched, (select last_update from lecture_progress where user_id = #{userId} and lecture_sn = l.lecture_sn and course_sn = l.course_sn) as last_update
FROM LECTURE l WHERE l.COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} ORDER BY l.SORT_ORD ASC, l.LECTURE_SN ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO LECTURE_PROGRESS p USING (SELECT #{lectureId} AS lectureSn, #{courseId} AS courseSn FROM dual) src ON (p.LECTURE_SN = src.lectureSn AND p.COURSE_SN = src.courseSn AND p.USER_ID = #{userId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.SECONDS_WATCHED = #{progress}, p.LAST_UPDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (LECTURE_SN, COURSE_SN, USER_ID, SECONDS_WATCHED, LAST_UPDATE) VALUES (src.lectureSn, src.courseSn, #{userId}, #{progress}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: select COURSE_SN, COURSE_NM, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID from COURSE where COURSE_SN = (select COURSE_SN from LECTURE where ATCH_FILE_ID = #{fileServerId})
